prompt: Create a wide cinematic photorealistic scene in a sunlit stone quarry at golden hour, showing two versions of the same adult man: on the left, the sculptor, a dusty quarry worker in an olive-green t-shirt, dark cargo pants, work boots, and protective safety glasses, standing close to the statue while holding a hammer in one hand and a chisel in the other; on the right, a life-sized white marble statue of the same man seated on a rectangular stone block, wearing a long simple tunic or kurta-like robe with soft carved folds, hands resting on the knees, legs crossed at the ankles, and a large circular stone halo disk behind the head. The sculptor is actively chiseling the statue near the neck and shoulder, with bright marble dust particles exploding into the warm backlight. The quarry walls rise tall in the background, with scaffolding, ropes, stone blocks, and exactly 5 background quarry workers wearing light work clothes and helmets: one standing on left scaffolding, one farther behind him, one on the right scaffolding, one seated or crouched near the lower right, and one small figure walking at the far right. Use dramatic sunlight streaming from the upper left, volumetric dust, shallow depth of field, realistic stone texture, warm beige and gray color grading, rugged industrial atmosphere, high-detail cinema lighting, 3:4 vertical composition, medium-wide framing, no text, no watermark. The visible faces should be neutral and unobtrusive, with the sculptor and statue clearly sharing the same identity; use dusty olive green for the worker clothing and white marble for the statue.
